name: smurf-xmd
description: 𓅓 𝐃𝐀𝐑𝐊 𝐋𝐎𝐑𝐃𓅣._XMD, a Multi Device Whatsapp Bot to Enhance Whatsapp Communication Experience

SESSION_ID.description: Your bot SESSION_ID. Get one from the pairing session page.

MODE.description: Worktype of your bot. Use 'public' (everyone can use it) or 'private' (only bot number).

TIME_ZONE.description: Your timezone e.g. Africa/Nairobi, America/New_York, Asia/Kolkata

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Auto-like WhatsApp statuses. Set true or false.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Auto-view WhatsApp statuses. Set true or false.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Leave blank to use the auto-provisioned Heroku Postgres addon, or supply your own (Neon, Supabase, etc.). Falls back to SQLite if empty and no addon is attached.
